CRITICAL.name: data_freshness_breach
CRITICAL.condition: Pipeline has not run in more than 24 hours
CRITICAL.message: Data freshness alert: Pipeline has not run in more than 24 hours. Immediate action required.
CRITICAL.recommended_action: Investigate and restart the pipeline immediately.

CRITICAL.name: quality_threshold_violation
CRITICAL.message: Data quality alert: Quality percentage is below 99.9%. Immediate action required.
CRITICAL.recommended_action: Investigate and resolve data quality issues immediately.

CRITICAL.name: row_count_out_of_bounds
CRITICAL.condition: Row count is outside the bounds of 17 to 25
CRITICAL.message: Row count alert: Row count is outside the bounds of 17 to 25. Immediate action required.
CRITICAL.recommended_action: Investigate and ensure row count is within the specified bounds.

WARNING.name: runtime_approaching_limit
WARNING.message: Runtime alert: Pipeline runtime is approaching 120 minutes. Attention required by next business day.

WARNING.name: quality_slightly_below_threshold
WARNING.condition: Data quality percentage is slightly below 99.9%
WARNING.message: Data quality alert: Quality percentage is slightly below 99.9%. Attention required by next business day.

WARNING.name: merchant_failure_rate_spike
WARNING.condition: One merchant's failure rate spikes above 30%
WARNING.message: Merchant failure alert: One merchant's failure rate has spiked above 30%. Attention required by next business day.
WARNING.recommended_action: Investigate and resolve the merchant's failure rate issue.

INFO.name: new_payment_method_detected
INFO.condition: A new payment method is detected in the data
INFO.message: New payment method detected: A new payment method has been detected in the data.
INFO.recommended_action: Log the new payment method for future reference.

INFO.name: row_count_near_bounds
INFO.condition: Daily row count is near the bounds of 17 to 25
INFO.message: Row count alert: Daily row count is near the bounds of 17 to 25.
INFO.recommended_action: Monitor the row count to ensure it remains within bounds.
